title: Add synchronized_hop_channel() using hash_32 oracle from ccp16-hop.json and hash_32.json
description: Implement in python/src/lichen/sim/ (update tdma.py or add to protocol.py/simulation.py). Use independent FNV-1a32 oracle, not self-test. Match SelectChannel pseudocode in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:2a.3.1. Add unit test.
